meaning: adj.尼采(德国哲学家)哲学的n.尼采哲学的研究家
examples: Now, boldly, let's declare in a Nietzschean manner, that.
The creeping emptiness I had felt most of my life became a full-blown Nietzschean void.
If you want to use the Nietzschean language, "transvaluation" of our most basic vocabulary about good and evil.
The title, a lame Nietzschean knock-off, seems to be seeking a transvaluation of the word mess.
One is Mahler's part-Nietzschean, part-Buddhist belief that we live and work through cycles of reincarnation, aiming towards purification.
